calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Nov-22-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Robert Jackson appeared via zoom for Margarete Cabatu and Ronald Cupido (co-administrators).
Azita Rahim appeared via zoom for American Research Bureau (assignee).

Discussion was held regarding Josefina Cupido's 20 % share. The Court denied the request to distribute Josefina Cupido's share to Ronald Cupido. Report status of administration is taken under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Report Of Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Jun-07-2022 Continued To Jul-12-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Robert Jackson, via Zoom, for Margarete Cabatu and Ronald Cupido, co-Administrators; Azita Rahim, via Zoom, for Janet McMahon, Joyce Warren, Anne Warren Sprock, Patty Villata; Brenda Mendiata, Marlee Silva, Anabelle Espinoza, and Humberto Espinosa, Heirs.

Mr. Jackson reports that COVID related issues have caused delays and that he has basic information regarding additional heirs which he intends to file shortly. The court confirms that Mr. Jackson intends to file a Petition for Approval of Status Report and an Heirship Petition. The court advises Mr. Jackson that if he files an Heirship Petition, a Petition for Approval of Status Report will not be required at this time. The court confirms with counsel that the real property has been sold and the proceeds from the sale are in one Charles Schwab account. The court reminds Mr. Jackson that if the proceeds from the sale of real property exceed $250,000, they must be placed in separate accounts to comply with the FDIC limits.

After additional discussion, the matter is continued to Jul-12-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. A Status of Deposit of Funds Into Insured Accounts is set for the same date.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Bastain. Not Reported.
